evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of re-signing when terms update, as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this requirement, such as system notifications to users or a mechanism for tracking updates to terms. This indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement, as the evidence does not support the expected behavior of notifying users to re-sign after terms are updated.
gaps: No evidence of system notifications for re-signing after terms update.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
